description: Giving critical feedback on a report

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I need to tell my colleague her report has major structural problems but she's sensitive and has been working really hard on it. I don't want to crush her.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: Lead with genuine acknowledgment of her effort, then use specific language: 'I think we can make this even stronger if we restructure section 3.' Focus on the work, not the person.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: What if she gets defensive? She's done that before when I've given feedback.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: I need to tell my colleague her report has major structural problems but she's sensitive and has been working really hard on it. I don't want to crush her.

scores.rationale: Concern for colleague's feelings before delivering critical news.
Care for colleague appears sincere rather than performative.
Delay in delivering feedback out of concern for impact.
